athlete_id.description: Target athlete; defaults to selected athlete in coach mode, or the only athlete otherwise. Format: i12345 or 12345.

end_date.description: Inclusive athlete-local report end date YYYY-MM-DD.

include_full.description: When true, include bounded evidence lists (activity samples, summary dates, wellness dates, calendar events). Raw stream samples are never fetched by this report.

sport.description: Optional sport/category filter such as Ride, Run, Swim, or VirtualRide. Leave empty to inspect all visible data.

start_date.description: Inclusive athlete-local report start date YYYY-MM-DD.
